author: y4rr
content:
Observation: 3 test logic errors found on first run (51/54 pass):

1. init_xavier_normal_std / init_kaiming_normal_std: test creates 1000x1000 param for stat verification but expected_std fixture value is for the specific shape [fan_out, fan_in]. The big shape changes the fan values, changing expected std. Fix: use the actual fixture fan values to create the right-sized param for bound verification.

2. lazy_batch_norm_1d: fixture captures output from lazy BN after one training forward (running stats updated), but test compares against fresh BatchNorm1d with default stats. Fix: compare lazy module's own eval output against fixture directly, not via a fresh BN.

Plan: fix test logic in both cases — no impl bugs.
